updates.author: jane.doe@acme.com
updates.body: We've been double-charged on our April invoice. This is a critical issue for our finance team.

updates.author: ops@globex.io
updates.body: SSO login is completely broken for all users in our org. We cannot access Atlas at all.

updates.author: agent.rivera@support.com
updates.body: I'm escalating this immediately and looping in our auth team.

updates.author: dba@initech.com
updates.body: A collection appears to have been dropped during last night's migration window. We need help recovering it urgently.

updates.author: dev@umbrella.com
updates.body: Our Atlas Search queries are returning results in 4-6 seconds. This started after the index rebuild yesterday.

updates.author: agent.chen@support.com
updates.body: Can you share the explain plan output for one of the slow queries?

updates.author: dev@umbrella.com
updates.body: Attached. The index scan looks normal to me but I'm not sure what to look for.

updates.author: finance@papyrus.com
updates.body: We downgraded our cluster tier last week but are still being billed at the old rate.

updates.author: agent.kim@support.com
updates.body: I can see the tier change in our logs. Looping in the billing team to issue a credit.

updates.author: infra@bluth.co
updates.body: Intermittent connection timeouts to our Atlas cluster from our VPC. Happens every 20-30 minutes.

updates.author: platform@vandelay.io
updates.body: The MongoDB Atlas Terraform provider is returning a 409 conflict when we try to create a new project. Our pipeline is blocked.

updates.author: agent.rivera@support.com
updates.body: This looks like a known race condition in provider v1.14. Can you try pinning to v1.13.2 as a workaround while we investigate?

updates.author: platform@vandelay.io
updates.body: Pinning to v1.13.2 unblocked us for now. Still need the fix in the latest version.

updates.author: dev@reynholm.io
updates.body: The docs for fuzzy matching in Atlas Search don't mention whether maxEdits applies per token or per field. Can someone clarify?

updates.author: product@massive-dynamic.com
updates.body: Is there a way to receive a webhook when an Atlas Stream Processor enters an error state? Currently we have to poll stats().

updates.author: agent.chen@support.com
updates.body: Not currently — I've logged this as a feature request with the product team.

updates.author: dev@wernham-hogg.com
updates.body: Getting MongoServerSelectionError on startup. Using Node.js driver 6.3.

updates.author: agent.kim@support.com
updates.body: Can you confirm your IP is on the Atlas access list and share your connection string (redact credentials)?

updates.author: dev@wernham-hogg.com
updates.body: That was it — my IP wasn't on the list. All working now.
